dibianca-arthur.text: No public data in our set connects Arthur DiBianca's recorded background or positions specifically to property taxes or public school funding.

As of 2025-12-31, Arthur DiBianca's campaign had raised $3,750, per Texas Ethics Commission filings (this filing period only, not a cycle-to-date total). That is general campaign-finance context; it does not tell us the candidate's stance on property taxes or public school funding.

caveats: We only show a connection to homeowner parent concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.

summary: For a homeowner parent voter looking at the Railroad Commissioner of Texas race (Bo French, Jon Rosenthal, Arthur DiBianca): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on property taxes or public school funding for this race.
